contents:
(** * Commutative squares *)

(** Commutative squares compose vertically.

      A --f--> B
      |    //  |
      h  comm  g
      |  //    |
      V //     V
      C --f'-> D
      |    //  |
      h' comm' g'
      |  //    |
      V //     V
      E --f''> F
*)

Lemma comm_square_comp {A B C D E F}
  {f : A -> B} {f': C -> D} {h : A -> C} {g : B -> D} (comm : f' o h == g o f)
  {f'': E -> F} {h' : C -> E} {g' : D -> F} (comm' : f'' o h' == g' o f')
  : f'' o (h' o h) == (g' o g) o f.

goals.conclusion: f'' o (h' o h) == g' o g o f

hypotheses.type: f' o h == g o f
f'' o h' == g' o f'

goals.conclusion: f'' o (h' o h) == g' o g o f

hypotheses.type: f' o h == g o f
f'' o h' == g' o f'
f' o h == g o f
f'' o h' == g' o f'

goals.conclusion: g' (f' (h x)) = g' (g (f x))

hypotheses.type: f' o h == g o f
f'' o h' == g' o f'

contents:
(** Commutative squares compose horizontally.

      A --k--> B --l--> C
      |    //  |    //  |
      f  comm  g  comm  h
      |  //    |  //    |
      V //     V //     V
      X --i--> Y --j--> Z
*)

goals.conclusion: j o i o f == h o (l o k)

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion: j o i o f == h o (l o k)

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion: j (i (f x)) = h (l (k x))

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

goals.conclusion: j (i (f x)) = j (g (k x))

hypotheses.type: i o f == g o k
j o g == h o l

contents:
(** Given any commutative square from [f] to [f'] whose verticals
[wA, wB] are equivalences, the [equiv_inv] square from [f'] to [f] with verticals [wA ^-1, wB ^-1] also commutes. *)

goals.conclusion: f o wA^-1 == wB^-1 o f'

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion: f o wA^-1 == wB^-1 o f'

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f
f' o wA == wB o f
f' o wA == wB o f
f' o wA == wB o f
f' o wA == wB o f
f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion: f' (wA (wA^-1 a')) = f' a'

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

contents:
(** Up to naturality, the result of [comm_square_inverse] really is a
retraction (aka left inverse); *)

Lemma comm_square_inverse_is_sect
  {A B : Type} {f : A -> B}
  {A' B' : Type} {f' : A' -> B'}
  (wA : A <~> A') (wB : B <~> B')
  (wf : f' o wA == wB o f) (a : A)
  : comm_square_comp wf (comm_square_inverse wf) a @ eissect wB (f a)
   = ap f (eissect wA a).

goals.conclusion:
comm_square_comp wf (comm_square_inverse wf) a @ eissect wB (f a) =
ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
comm_square_comp wf (comm_square_inverse wf) a @ eissect wB (f a) =
ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(((eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))))^ @
  ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)))) @
 ap wB^-1 (wf a)) @
eissect wB (f a) = ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))))^ @
(ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @
 (ap wB^-1 (wf a) @ eissect wB (f a))) =
ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @
(ap wB^-1 (wf a) @ eissect wB (f a)) =
eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))) @ ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

contents: transitivity (ap (wB ^-1 o wB) (ap f (eissect wA a)) @ eissect wB (f a)).

goals.conclusion:
ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @
(ap wB^-1 (wf a) @ eissect wB (f a)) =
ap (wB^-1 o wB) (ap f (eissect wA a)) @ eissect wB (f a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap (wB^-1 o wB) (ap f (eissect wA a)) @ eissect wB (f a) =
eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))) @ ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap (wB^-1 o wB) (ap f (eissect wA a)) @ eissect wB (f a) =
eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))) @ ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))) @ ap idmap (ap f (eissect wA a)) =
eissect wB (f (wA^-1 (wA a))) @ ap f (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @
(ap wB^-1 (wf a) @ eissect wB (f a)) =
ap (wB^-1 o wB) (ap f (eissect wA a)) @ eissect wB (f a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @
 ap wB^-1 (wf a)) @
eissect wB (f a) =
ap (fun x : B => wB^-1 (wB x)) (ap f (eissect wA a)) @ eissect wB (f a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @ ap wB^-1 (wf a) =
ap (fun x : B => wB^-1 (wB x)) (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap wB^-1 (((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @ wf a) =
ap (fun x : B => wB^-1 (wB x)) (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap wB^-1 (((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @ wf a) =
ap wB^-1 (ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a)))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
((wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a))) @ wf a =
ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(wf (wA^-1 (wA a)))^ @ (ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)) @ wf a) =
ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)) @ wf a =
wf (wA^-1 (wA a)) @ ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

contents: path_via (ap (f' o wA) (eissect wA a) @ wf a).

goals.conclusion:
ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)) @ wf a =
ap (fun x : A => f' (wA x)) (eissect wA a) @ wf a

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap (fun x : A => f' (wA x)) (eissect wA a) @ wf a =
wf (wA^-1 (wA a)) @ ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)) @ wf a =
ap (fun x : A => f' (wA x)) (eissect wA a) @ wf a

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion: ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)) = ap (fun x : A => f' (wA x)) (eissect wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion: ap f' (eisretr wA (wA a)) = ap f' (ap wA (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap (fun x : A => f' (wA x)) (eissect wA a) @ wf a =
wf (wA^-1 (wA a)) @ ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 (wA a)) @ ap (fun x : A => wB (f x)) (eissect wA a) =
wf (wA^-1 (wA a)) @ ap wB (ap f (eissect wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

contents: (** and similarly, [comm_square_inverse] is a section (aka right [equiv_inv]). *)

Lemma comm_square_inverse_is_retr
  {A B : Type} {f : A -> B}
  {A' B' : Type} {f' : A' -> B'}
  (wA : A <~> A') (wB : B <~> B')
  (wf : f' o wA == wB o f) (a : A')
  : comm_square_comp (comm_square_inverse wf) wf a @ eisretr wB (f' a)
  = ap f' (eisretr wA a).

goals.conclusion:
comm_square_comp (comm_square_inverse wf) wf a @ eisretr wB (f' a) =
ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
comm_square_comp (comm_square_inverse wf) wf a @ eisretr wB (f' a) =
ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(wf (wA^-1 a) @
 ap wB
   ((eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^ @
    ap wB^-1 ((wf (wA^-1 a))^ @ ap f' (eisretr wA a)))) @
eisretr wB (f' a) = ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(wf (wA^-1 a) @
 (ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^ @
  (ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^) @ ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a)))))) @
eisretr wB (f' a) = ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
(((wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^) @
  ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^)) @
 ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a)))) @
eisretr wB (f' a) = ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
((wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^) @
 ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^)) @
(ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)) =
ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

contents:
set (p := (ap wB (ap (wB ^-1) (ap f' (eisretr wA a)))
            @ eisretr wB (f' a))).

goals.conclusion:
((wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^) @
 ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^)) @
p = ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
((wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^) @
 ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^)) @
p = (eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ p

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion: (eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ p = ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
((wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^) @
 ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^)) @
p = (eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ p

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
(wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^) @
ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^) = (eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^ =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ (ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

contents:
path_via ((eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA ^-1 a))))^ @
      ap (wB o wB ^-1) (wf ((wA ^-1) a))).

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^ =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a)) =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ (ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 a) @ ap wB (eissect wB (f (wA^-1 a)))^ =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 a) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^ =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 a) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^ =
ap idmap (wf (wA^-1 a)) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
ap idmap (wf (wA^-1 a)) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^ =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
wf (wA^-1 a) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^ =
ap idmap (wf (wA^-1 a)) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
ap idmap (wf (wA^-1 a)) @ (eisretr wB (wB (f (wA^-1 a))))^ =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a)) =
(eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ (ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (wf (wA^-1 a)) =
(ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))^))^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))) = ((ap wB (ap wB^-1 (wf (wA^-1 a))))^)^

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion: (eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))))^ @ p = ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion: p = eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

hypotheses.body: ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a)

goals.conclusion:
ap wB (ap wB^-1 (ap f' (eisretr wA a))) @ eisretr wB (f' a) =
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (ap f' (eisretr wA a)) @ eisretr wB (f' a) =
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

contents: path_via (eisretr wB _ @ ap idmap (ap f' (eisretr wA a))).

goals.conclusion:
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (ap f' (eisretr wA a)) @ eisretr wB (f' a) =
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap idmap (ap f' (eisretr wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap idmap (ap f' (eisretr wA a)) =
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
ap (fun x : B' => wB (wB^-1 x)) (ap f' (eisretr wA a)) @ eisretr wB (f' a) =
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap idmap (ap f' (eisretr wA a))

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f

goals.conclusion:
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap idmap (ap f' (eisretr wA a)) =
eisretr wB (f' (wA (wA^-1 a))) @ ap f' (eisretr wA a)

hypotheses.type: f' o wA == wB o f
